channel.title: Etienne Tack - About on Etienne Tack
channel.description: Recent content in Etienne Tack - About on Etienne Tack

item.title: Etienne Tack - About
item.description: About Me Etienne Tack has been a PhD student in computer science at INSIGHT company, in New Caledonia, since September 2021. He is a member of the Institute of Pure and Applied Sciences research laboratory (ISEA) at the University of New Caledonia (UNC). His PhD, entitled Development of Hybrid Agent-Based Environmental Applications, Guided by Data Sciences, is supervised by Frederic Flouvat, Associate Professor in computer science at the UNC, and co-directed by Jean Marie Fotsing, Professor in geography at the UNC.
